entries.description: Registered S2 start; read guidance, S1 deliverables (pull_verifier.py, tool-contract.md), providers.py, config.py, router-config.yaml; confirmed 3 provider keys present.
Added OpenAIBinding (Responses API: function_call/function_call_output, previous_response_id reasoning chaining) - chat completions rejects function tools+reasoning_effort for gpt-5.4.
Added GeminiBinding (function_declarations/functionCall/functionResponse, bounded thinkingBudget, thoughts folded into output tokens).

Wired pull_verifier executor block in router-config.yaml (per-provider model pins, caps max_output_tokens=24000, per-provider generation_params); resolvers caps_from_config/_resolve_model/_resolve_gen_params read it.

Metered headless check: all 3 providers drove read-only tool loop, issued real probes (2-3 each), returned schema-valid ISSUES_FOUND, all caught seeded defect; ~$0.048 total. s2-headless-results.json.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5.4): R1 ISSUES_FOUND 3 Minor (OpenAI cursor not failure-atomic; OpenAI nudge-offset test gap; Gemini multi-same-name + gemini-3 test gaps) -> fixed -> R2 1 Minor (cursor committed before parse) -> fixed (parse-before-commit + non-dict-item skip) -> R3 VERIFIED. Full ai_router suite GREEN 1492 passed/1 skipped. disposition.json + s2-issues*.json + routed S3 next-orch rec (claude-opus-4-8 high) written.

Registered S3 start (claude-opus-4-8 high, per routed S3 rec); read project-guidance, lessons-learned, session-set-authoring-guide, spec.md, tool-contract.md, forward-ab-design.md, bake-off-results.md, and the shipped ai_router/pull_verifier.py adapter; confirmed all 3 provider API keys present.

Pre-registered Experiment A criteria (experiment-a-preregistration.md): H1 context-access, H2 provider-multiplicity, H3 routed-unique-capability, H4 falsifier-coverage; arms, metrics, noise band, grading rule + audit, decision rule - all fixed before any data.

Built seeded-defect mock-repo (build_trees.py): 5 frozen trees (buggy+fixed), 20 defects across all 8 forward-ab-design classes (2 Critical, 2 novel controls), each labelled probeable/novel + in-snippet/cross-file. catalogue.json carries pre-registered catch predicates.

Pre-authored deterministic falsifier suite (falsifier_suite.py): 19/20 discriminate cleanly (fail-on-buggy/pass-on-fixed); D16 documented non-discriminating latent control. Coverage 0.95 ~ retrospective ~92%.

Ran 2x2 arms (run_arms.py): A1/A2 routed GPT/Gemini snippet-only, B1/B2 path-aware adapter GPT/Gemini whole-tree, blind, K=3, matched reasoning across context contrast. 60 runs, ~$1.38 metered, all raw persisted to raw/. Pilot first exposed+fixed a cross-file leakage/grading-validity issue (audit layer added).

Analyzed into experiment-a-results.md. VERDICT (audited, vs pre-registered criteria): H1 context-access CONFIRMED (B1-A1 +0.306, B2-A2 +0.361, both >> noise band, gains 100%% cross-file incl 2 Criticals D5/D9 path-aware-only); H3 routed unique-capability RULED OUT (routed-pair MINUS pa-pair = empty; only cadence defense survives -> 068 Exp B); H2 context-access is the lever not provider-multiplicity (2nd routed validator +0.0, path-aware +0.306 beyond); H4 falsifier coverage 19/20=0.95, the 1 non-probeable (D16 latent) caught by agent reasoning. => path-aware CAPABILITY CONFIRMED -> S4 wires the opt-in producer. 60 runs ~.38.

Cross-provider verification of the ANALYSIS (gpt-5.4 high, ~/usr/bin/bash.298): R1 VERIFIED. Verifier confirmed H1/H2/H3/H4 follow from the data under the pre-registered rule and the load-bearing manual audit (routed cross-file hypothetical/artifact rejections) is defensible against the committed raw text - NOT outcome-driven. 3 Minor wording/consistency fixes (B2 misses D16 so not strictly lossless; tie H2 to noise-band rule; do not narrow the prereg audit scope) ALL applied. s3-issues.json + s3-verification.md saved.
